ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., pitcher, catcher) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player (right or left) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player (right or left) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "major_league_debut" TEXT /* Date the player made their major league debut */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., American, National) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the league (e.g., East, West) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Team's social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "putouts" INTEGER /* Number of putouts */,
  "chits" INTEGER /* Number of catch hits */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "homeruns" INTEGER /* Number of homeruns */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging percentage */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average (for pitchers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the salary belongs to */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the salary is for */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount */,
  "performance_bonus" REAL /* Performance-based bonus amount */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES player_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game starts */,
  "game_day" TEXT /* Day of the week the game is scheduled */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "broadcasters" TEXT /* Names of the broadcasters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* User's access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the contract belongs to */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the contract is with */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., free agent, trade) */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "performance_clauses" TEXT /* Performance clauses in the contract */,
  "no_trade_clause" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player has a no-trade clause */,
  "opt_out_clause" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player has an opt-out clause */,
  "injury_protection" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contract includes injury protection */,
  "buyout" REAL /* Buyout amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the staff member (e.g., coach, manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
